titleStmt.title: SII 38.434: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 434. (A.R. No. 434 of 1912.) TIRUPPĀLATTUṞAI, PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Kshīravanēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarmaṉ Tribhuvanachchakravartti Kulōttuṅga (I) Year 43: 1113 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti, vīramē tuṇaiy = āgavum, of Vīrarājēndra chōḷa, followed by that of his successor Kulōttuṅga I, Pugaḻ-mādhu.

It contains an order of the king exempting Tiruchchiṟṟambalanallūr, a dēvadāna village of the Śiva temple at Tiruppālaittuṟai in Nallūr-nāḍu, in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu, from the payment of taxes including antarāyam and pāṭṭam. It is stated that the performance of daily rituals and services at the temple was affected because of the collection of these taxes. Consequently various personnel left the temple services. It further records that on the supplication made by (the official) Madhurāntakap-Pāvaināṭṭu-mūvēndavēḷāṉ, the above village, which consisted of five vēli, was declared as dēvadāna-iṟaiyīli by the king, commencing from his 43rd regnal year and the yield of one hundred kaḷam (of paddy) was to be utilized for providing offerings to the god.
Kōṭṭūr uḍaiyān, Nāṅkoṟṟaṉ and several other officials of land revenue department figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vīrametuṇaiyākavum tiyā
kameyaṇiyākavum ceṅkoloccikkaruṅka
likaṭintu pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu viru
mpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimai
yiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭicūṭi mīṉavar nilaikeṭa
villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉnavaririyaluṟṟi
ḻitarat tikkaṉaittum taṉcakkaranaṭātti vī
rasiṁhāsaṉattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭai
yāḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirā
[ja]kesaripanmarāna tribhuvanacakkaravarttikaḷ
śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 3
vatu tribhuvanaccakkaravatti konerimelkoṇ
ṭān nan=tamar Epperppaṭṭārkkum nittavi
ṉotavaḷanāṭṭu nallūrnāṭṭut tiruppālai
ttuṟai Uṭaiya mahādevar deva(ā)dānam
tirucciṟṟampalanallūr yāṇṭu 4 10 3 vatu muta
l An=tarāyam pāṭṭam n=taṇṭil tiruppaṭimā
ṟṟum muṭṭi palapaṇi niman=takkāraṟkum nilai
nillārkaḷenṟum Ivvūr yāṇṭu 43
vatu mutal An=tarāyam palapāṭṭa muṭppa
ṭa devatānaiṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟa ve
ṇṭum menṟu maturān=takappāvaināṭṭu mu
ven=taveḷān namakkuc connān tirucci
ṟṟampalanallūr 4 10 3vatu mutal An=tarā
māka Iṭṭu nam vari
Uḷvaripotak kāṭṭinom Iv
ttu An=tarāyam pala pāṭṭa
tom viṉota
rai yāṇṭu 4 10 3
ttavinota
erased
kku teṟkum
coḻa mākāḷattukku kiḻakkum cev
k kiḻellaikku merkkum naṭuvu paṭa
Ai velikku veli+kku I 2 1000 Āka I
ṟai kaṭṭiṉa Iraḷam yāṇṭu 4 10 3vatu mu
tal cantrāditta yam pala pāṭṭamuṭ
ppaṭa devatānaiṟaiyili nilam niṅkal
pokku § Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam
koṭṭuruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai veḷur
kiḻavan Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanā
yakam nāṅkoṟṟan Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari
tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam maṇalūrkiḻavan
Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāya kunṟa me
yān Eḻuttu Ivai marutaṅkiḻān Eḻuttu
Ivai veṇkuḷampākkiḻān E
muttu ....
Digital edition of SII 38.434 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
